Uses of Class
org.moeaframework.core.Epsilons

Packages that use Epsilons
Package
Description
org.moeaframework
Convenience classes for using the MOEA Framework.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso
Implementations of various Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis
Tools for analyzing the runtime and end-of-run behavior of algorithms.
org.moeaframework.analysis.collector
Collectors record information periodically during the execution of an algorithm.
org.moeaframework.core
Contains the core classes used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.comparator
Contains dominance comparators and other comparators used by this framework.
org.moeaframework.core.indicator
Collection of unary quality indicators for comparing the quality of non-dominated approximation sets.
org.moeaframework.core.spi
Defines the service provider interfaces (SPIs) and factories for constructing problems, algorithms and operators.
org.moeaframework.problem.DTLZ
Package for the scalable DTLZ test problem suite.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    NondominatedPopulation
    Analyzer.EndOfRunResults.getAggregate(Epsilons epsilons)
    Calculates and returns the end-of-run aggregate set for these results.

    Analyzer.withEpsilons(Epsilons epsilons)

    Description
     
    OMOPSO(Problem problem, int swarmSize, int leaderSize, Epsilons epsilons, double mutationProbability, double mutationPerturbation, int maxIterations)

  • Uses of Epsilons in org.moeaframework.analysis

    Fields in org.moeaframework.analysis declared as Epsilons
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Epsilons
    DefaultEpsilons.DEFAULT
    The default ε value that is returned for any problem without an explicitly configured value.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.analysis that return Epsilons
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected Epsilons
    DefaultEpsilons.findOverride(String problemName)
    Finds the overridden ε values for the given problem, either one set by calling DefaultEpsilons.override(org.moeaframework.core.Problem, org.moeaframework.core.Epsilons) or from Settings.getProblemSpecificEpsilons(String).
    Epsilons
    DefaultEpsilons.getEpsilons(String problemName)
    Returns the default ε values for the given problem.
    Epsilons
    DefaultEpsilons.getEpsilons(Problem problem)
    Returns the default ε values for the given problem.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TabularData<Map.Entry<String,Epsilons>>
    DefaultEpsilons.asTabularData()
     
    Methods in org.moeaframework.analysis with parameters of type Epsilons
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    DefaultEpsilons.override(String problemName, Epsilons epsilons)
    Overrides the ε value for the given problem name.
    void
    DefaultEpsilons.override(Problem problem, Epsilons epsilons)
    Overrides the ε value for the given problem.

  • Uses of Epsilons in org.moeaframework.analysis.collector

    Constructors in org.moeaframework.analysis.collector with parameters of type Epsilons
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ApproximationSetCollector(Algorithm algorithm, Epsilons epsilons)
    Constructs a collector for recording approximation sets from the specified algorithm.
     
    ApproximationSetCollector(Epsilons epsilons)
    Constructs an unattached collector for recording ε-box dominance approximation sets from an algorithm.

  • Uses of Epsilons in org.moeaframework.core

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core that return Epsilons
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Epsilons
    Settings.getProblemSpecificEpsilons(String problem)
    Returns a problem-specific ε value used in algorithms, archives, and other objects based on ε dominance.
    static Epsilons
    Epsilons.of(double e1, double... es)
    Creates an Epsilons instance with the given epsilon values.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.core with parameters of type Epsilons
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive
    EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive.of(Population population, Epsilons epsilons)
    Converts the population to an ε-box dominance archive with the given ε values.
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.core with parameters of type Epsilons
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive(Epsilons epsilons)
    Constructs an empty ε-box dominance archive using an additive ε-box dominance comparator with the specified ε values.
     
    EpsilonBoxDominanceArchive(Epsilons epsilons, Iterable<? extends Solution> iterable)
    Constructs an ε-box dominance archive using an additive ε-box dominance comparator with the specified ε values and initialized with the specified solutions.

  • Uses of Epsilons in org.moeaframework.core.comparator

    Fields in org.moeaframework.core.comparator declared as Epsilons
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected final Epsilons
    EpsilonBoxObjectiveComparator.epsilons
    The ε values used by this comparator.
    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.comparator that return Epsilons
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Epsilons
    EpsilonBoxObjectiveComparator.getEpsilons()
    Returns the ε values in use by this comparator.
    Constructors in org.moeaframework.core.comparator with parameters of type Epsilons
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    EpsilonBoxDominanceComparator(Epsilons epsilons)
    Constructs a dominance comparator for comparing solutions first using the AggregateConstraintComparator followed by the EpsilonBoxObjectiveComparator with the specified ε values.
     
    EpsilonBoxObjectiveComparator(Epsilons epsilons)
    Constructs an additive ε-box dominance comparator with the specified ε values.

    Constructor
    Description
     
    Contribution(NondominatedPopulation referenceSet, Epsilons epsilons)
    Constructs the contribution indicator using the specified reference set and ε values.

  • Uses of Epsilons in org.moeaframework.core.spi

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.spi that return Epsilons
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Epsilons
    ProblemFactory.getEpsilons(String name)
    Searches through all discovered ProblemProvider instances, returning the ε values of the problem with the registered name.
    Epsilons
    ProblemProvider.getEpsilons(String name)
    Returns the recommended or default ε values for the specified problem, or null if this provider does not support the problem or no defaults are provided.
    Epsilons
    RegisteredProblemProvider.getEpsilons(String name)
     
    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.spi with parameters of type Epsilons
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final void
    RegisteredProblemProvider.registerEpsilons(String name, Epsilons epsilons)
    Registers the ε values for the given problem, used as the defaults when constructing an algorithm, archive, or other object that uses ε-based dominance.
